raw_text: It is a good delivery app and I have ordered many times also they give coupans but they do not give free delivery in any of the order like other apps do like zepto, flipkart minutes above of the order ₹100 but they don't do like this it is a humble request to add free delivery above the order of ₹100

Pro tip: If your Blinkit electronics product has a technical fault, don't bother reporting it. Apparently, physical damage gets more attention than actual malfunctioning products. Extremely disappointing return policy and customer support experience.

Very disappointed regarding the refund. if i have returned the order the balance should be credited in my account but what you did provide a promo code to invest the same amount in this app. very bad. This is not fair.

Bought a WiFi adapter from Blinkit advertised with “150 Mbps” capability, but it only supports 2.4 GHz and cannot even detect modern 5 GHz WiFi networks. Product description never clearly mentioned this limitation. Support simply asked me to contact the manufacturer instead of resolving the issue, even within minutes of delivery. Selling outdated/incompatible tech without proper disclosure and then refusing refund is misleading for consumers. Expected better accountability from brinkit

No doubt blinkit is providing faster delivery of products conveniently. Fruits and vegetables are fresh and of better quality but costlier . Surge charges are also added even after adding the products that take delivery within 1.5 km distance from the Blinkit store which is completely not justified. This is a kind of complaint which cannot be done on the chat window on the app. These things require improvement @Blinkit

Blinkit app has some glitch or bug as per my experience related to payment procedure. When the whole process of checkout and payment is completed then also the app shows retry payment option due to which order gets placed double or triple due to repayment. Also sometimes it shows wrong calculation of the total of the cart items.

If they don't have ordered items they will add the same item of a different brand which is much cheaper and they will give you a previous higher price only. And they don't consult whether or not you want that cheaper version on the same previous higher price.

Customer support is not available on call and issues are not solved, no refund also discussed. I ordered ice cream cake but received it so unhygienically and completely damaged inside and no seal as well. when trying to ask them to take it back and return the amount no response from the support team. very badly managed. Very disappointed.

Delivery on time no matter but sometimes the product quality is not good or having an issue with items also customer care does not support it's too long to connect with customer care the only one option to choose computerize customer support but that's not inuff.Very long process or take a time to upload videos or photos of receive wrong item or having an issue with items.

Blinkit has made shopping extremely easy and convenient for me. The delivery is always super fast, products arrive fresh and well-packed, and the app is simple to use. I really appreciate the wide variety of items available and the helpful customer support. Overall, Blinkit saves time and provides an excellent shopping experience every day.

very very worst experience in blinkit damage products are selling and customer care won't listen our feedback and whenever ordering i didn't receive the product on time always delivery partner not assigned in time overall rating is zero. even they won't refund the amount in our bank account so again we need to order on same blink and again same issues occured. in urapakkam area blinkit is very worst.

Hi, I received my food items packed together with a mosquito killer spray in the same package, which is already unsafe and unhygienic. On top of that, the spray packaging was slightly torn and the product also looked used/opened. This is very careless handling, especially when chemical products are packed with edible items. Even though I’m not asking for a refund or replacement, I want to seriously report this issue so it does not happen again with other customers. Please look into this.

Prblem1. It doesn't detect the icici iMobile app. when making payment, what it does is opening the mobile site of icici NetBanking. So inconvenient. Prblem2. I do not want to use the app because it shows 10-20 rupees high for the same product in comparison to ordering from a mobile browser. But the mobile browser based site is not letting me order bcoz it shows that blinkit is not available at location. App lets me do the same order. So you are forcing cstmrs to use the app,pay more. Cheating
They are a bad app that says something, does something, if you order an offer, it is automatically canceled after the order is confirmed and the delivery man comes to give it again.
Worst experience with blink it, always sending bad quality products and damaged products. Not expected this, Don't purchase anything from blink it. Also showing less time but sending too late

The delivery is very good. It's on time. And if there's a fault in the orders that come in, the facility is also very easy to get. Overall, this app is absolutely perfect. And very useful. I'd like to thank the people at Blinkit for making our daily efforts easier.💯💯

Blinkit Wearhouse Manager Steal Material. They never give 1+1 free items. It is listed as 2 on the app but actually receiving 1 then the delivery partner is fighting with the customer to accept the 50% quantity

I ordered some items on blinkit ...When I received my order many items were missing. I contacted the support executive multiple times...even visited blinkit store personally. Store manager admitted that your package has not been delivered. Still my issue was not resolved.

I had a very bad experience with Blinkit. I purchased a product that appears to be used and is not working properly. I would like to return the item. I also want to raise a complaint regarding one of your executives, Rajveer. He does not know how to speak with customers or understand customer concerns. His behavior was very rude and unprofessional. @Blinkit Team, kindly look into this matter and take the necessary action. I expect a prompt resolution.

The worst app I have ever seen this is the first time I am giving a rating to one app . The worst app is the delivery agents asking for extra money for their delivery and saying if you don't give us extra money the order will be returned and the paid money won't come back and i tried to contact customer care but they don't respond . I have a chance i give highest negative rating.
